message:
Command `
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo "=== CHECKING LIBRELANE RUN STATUS ==="
echo ""
echo "=== All processes ==="
ps aux | grep -E "(openroad|librelane|python|magic|netgen|klayout)" | grep -v grep | head -20

echo ""
echo "=== flow.log (last 30 lines) ==="
tail -30 "$RUN_DIR/flow.log" 2>/dev/null

echo ""  
echo "=== error.log ==="
cat "$RUN_DIR/error.log" 2>/dev/null | tail -20

echo ""
echo "=== Step 70 - full directory ==="
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/"
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/"
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-1/"

echo ""
echo "=== All run steps ==="
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V

echo ""
echo "=== Final dir? ==="
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/final/" 2>/dev/null && echo "=== FINAL EXISTS ===" || echo "No final"
` executed with exit code 0.

extras.command:
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo "=== CHECKING LIBRELANE RUN STATUS ==="
echo ""
echo "=== All processes ==="
ps aux | grep -E "(openroad|librelane|python|magic|netgen|klayout)" | grep -v grep | head -20

echo ""
echo "=== flow.log (last 30 lines) ==="
tail -30 "$RUN_DIR/flow.log" 2>/dev/null

echo ""  
echo "=== error.log ==="
cat "$RUN_DIR/error.log" 2>/dev/null | tail -20

echo ""
echo "=== Step 70 - full directory ==="
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/"
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/"
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-1/"

echo ""
echo "=== All run steps ==="
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V

echo ""
echo "=== Final dir? ==="
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/final/" 2>/dev/null && echo "=== FINAL EXISTS ===" || echo "No final"
